message:
test(fcp-host): update enforcement check count to 10 and add SIGTERM shutdown test

Bump check_count assertions from 9 to 10 to match the BudgetCheck
addition. Add fcp_host_binary_sigterm_shutdown_aborts_in_flight_http_invoke
integration test verifying graceful shutdown under load: spawns HTTP host,
fires delayed invoke, sends SIGTERM mid-flight, asserts clean exit without
hanging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
